calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Armon Cooper appeared by courtcall for and with Elizabeth Onodera (petitioner) by zoom.
Rufus Cole appeared by zoom for Golden Gate Regional Center.
Bruce Feder (Guardian Ad Litem) appeared by zoom for Hiroshi Onodera (beneficiary).

The court noted that the Good Shepard Foundation is not going to be named as an alternate trustee and that there needs to be a request for bond in the estate case. The parties have no objection to Leo Bautista being appointed as the sole successor trustee. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is under submission with the court's intent to grant the appointment of Mr. Bautista.

The accounting petition in the estate case (300519) currently set for March 18, 2024 is continued to April 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Mar-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Armon Cooper, Esq., for and with Elizabeth Onodera, Petitioner.

Bruce Feder, Esq., guardian ad litem, for Hiroshi Onodera, Beneficiary.

Leo Bautista, interested party.

Rufus Cole, interested party.

At the outset, the court confirms with Mr. Feder that he waives notice to his client, as guardian ad litem. The court recognizes Mr. Cooper's recently filed second amended petition and takes the Order to Show Cause on today's calendar, off calendar. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the appointment of Leo Bautista as successor Trustee. There is discussion of the possible appointment of the Good Shepherd Foundation as an alternative Trustee. Mr. Armon requests a continuance so that he may confirm whether the Good Shepherd Foundation is willing to act as successor Trustee.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Mar-12-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Cooper is instructed to file a consent from the Good Shepherd Foundation one week prior to the next calling, if they are willing to act as successor Trustee.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: M Armon Cooper appearing via zoom for and with Elizabeth Onodera (petitioner).
Bruce Feder (Guardian ad litem) appearing via zoom for Hiroshi Onodera.
Rupus Cole appeared via courtcall for Golden Gate Regional.

Discussion was held regarding the appointment of a successor trustee, that funds cannot be transferred with out a trustee appointed, that parties went thru a bunch of candidates but were unsuccessful, and that Ms. Onodera would like to be considered as a candidate.

The Court orders the filing of a Second Amended Petition Appointment of Successor Trustee by January 24, 2024. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Armon Cooper (attorney) to appear on February 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $500.00 pursuant to CCP 177.5 and CCP 128, should not be imposed against him for failure to file the Second Amended Petition Appointment of Successor Trustee.

Petition for appointment of successor is continued to February 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visiting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Continued To Jan-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Armon Cooper appearing via zoom for and with Elizabeth Onodera (petitioner).
Bruce Feder (Guardian ad litem) appearing via zoom for Hiroshi Onodera.
Ruthus Cole appeared in person for Golden Gate Regional.

Discussion was held regarding the nominee for successor trustee, that Mr. Feder may have someone who is licensed fiduciary, and that they need a little more time to decide. The matter is continued to January 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Xiao: Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Oct-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Armon Cooper appearing via zoom for and with Elizabeth Onodera (petitioner).
Bruce Feder (Guardian ad litem) appearing via zoom for Hiroshi Onodera.

Discussion was held regarding the progress in getting trustee appointed, that Ms. Soloway expressed she's not a good fit, and that parties will need additional time to find someone else. Amended petition for order confirming successor trustee is continued to October 04, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Filing is due by September 20, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: M. Armon Cooper appearing via zoom for and with Elizabeth Onodera appearing via zoom and Hiroki Onodera not present (petitioners).
Bruce Feder (Guardian ad litem) for Hiroshi Onodera.

Discussion was held regarding getting a trustee appointed and a possibly a professional fiduciary. Parties stated they are working diligently to find the right candidate and will need more time. Amended petition for order confirming successor trustee is continued to August 09, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Continued To Feb-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Appointment Of Successor (Corporate) Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Transfer Of Property To Trust
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: M. Armon Cooper, via ZOOM, counsel for Elizabeth Onodera, Petitioner; Rufus Cole, via ZOOM, counsel for the Golden Gate Regional Center ("GGRC"), Objector; Bruce Feder, via ZOOM, Guardian Ad Litem for Hiroshi Onodera.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that it is inclined to adopt the tentative ruling and deny the Petition for Order Confirming, etc. Mr. Cooper presents oral argument in support of the petition. Mr. Feder reports that he does not oppose the petition and his primary concern is the impact it would have on his ward and who is appointed as Trustee. Mr. Feder also notes that current disbursements via the Special Needs Trust are sufficient. Mr. Cole also confirms that the GGRC's main concern is Hiroshi Onodera's care and that the GGRC will continue to work with Mr. Onodera's family to ensure his well-being. Mr. Feder then states that he would prefer that a temporary Successor Trustee be appointed via ex parte application.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee is denied and the Transfer of Property to Trust is off calendar. The court is to prepare an order. A Status Hearing on Appointment of a Successor (Corporate) Trustee is set for September 8, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
